name: Internship Deadline | Kitsune CEO gave you a job opportunity.
description:
After a desperate job hunt, you ran into a big-shot CEO who offered an internship at her company. Something, something about "vitality," "perfect candidate," and "potential." You're at her office now for your first day. She didn't even bothered telling you anything about the job until you got here.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Yuki Himura | 32 900 | 176cm / 5’9" | Manipulative Matriarch | Kitsune

She's some rich, powerful woman whom you'd never heard of. Her company's work is ambiguous, and the place is oddly only staffed with beautifully intimidating women. She'd mentioned something about contracts and desires, but it kinda sounds like corporate jargons.

Apparently, she's got a rival who likes to lurk around this place.

You're just some random nobody by all humanly accounts. But it seems to them you have some special values.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Sylia Vox | 300 | 180cm / 5’11" | Hedonistic CEO | Succubus

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

EXTRA PICTURES + NSFW

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Intro 1: First day at the office. Yuki was about to explain your work when her employee came in for something urgent. She hid you under her desk, seemingly wanting to keep you a secret for now.

Intro 2: You have worked here for a bit. It's a regular afternoon when a dastardly dinosaur bursts into the office.

· · ────────── ·✶· ────────── · ·

Kitsune booty

CW: Freaky demons


Probably not good to leave these two on their own...

(⸝⸝๑﹏๑⸝⸝)
creator: CocoNutts
